parameters.description: Execute a platform action through the Ascend Gateway. Pass api_name (e.g. handover, hubspot, n8n), action (e.g. safe_modify_workflow, list_workflows, read_rows, datatable_insert, log_change, get_platform_context), params (action-specific parameters), and tenant_id ('ascend' for platform ops). Key actions: handover.safe_modify_workflow with {workflow_id, changes} to modify workflows. handover.read_rows with {table_id} to read DataTable rows. handover.datatable_insert with {table_id, rows} to insert DataTable rows. handover.log_change to log platform changes.
